title: 💻 Batch Processing Skill for Claude Code | Scale AI Workflows
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Batch Processing. Optimizes large-scale task execution through agent swarms, API batch processing, and intelligent loops to maximize efficiency and reduce costs. ### Related Skills. Use when the user wants to create one or many images from data (CSV/list), reuse a visual template with different texts/photos, or batch-produce cards for a marketplace, social network, or event. Manages Discord operations including messaging, reactions, and channel management directly through Claude. Browse the MCP Market to get started. The Batch Processing skill for Claude Code empowers developers to handle high-volume tasks—such as reviewing dozens of files or processing hundreds of documents—without linear increases in time or token costs. It provides a strategic framework for selecting the optimal execution method based on scale: utilizing agent swarms for rapid parallel processing of 5-20 items, the Anthropic API Batch for 50% cost savings on massive datasets, or sequential loops for tasks with complex dependencies. Sync skills to **Claude Cowork**, **Claude Code**, **Codex**, and more.

Send non-urgent work to the Anthropic Batch API (or Vertex AI) at **50% cost** — directly from Claude Code. Works with the Anthropic API directly or through Google Cloud's Vertex AI. | `--api-key KEY` | Your Anthropic API key (required unless already in env) |. If you prefer not to run the install script — or need to install in a restricted environment — follow these steps to set up each component by hand. | **curl** | Polls the Anthropic API from statusline | `brew install curl` or `apt-get install curl` |. #### Step 2: Install the MCP server. #### Step 3: Install the skill file. #### Step 4 *(optional)*: Install the statusline script. > Skip this step if you don't want batch job counts in your Claude Code status bar. The toolkit reads `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` from `~/.claude/env`. #### Step 6: Register the MCP server in `~/.claude.json`. #### Step 7 *(optional)*: Configure the statusline in `~/.claude/settings.json`.

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch processing - Claude Platform Docs
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Batch processing. Batch processing is a powerful approach for handling large volumes of requests efficiently. Instead of processing requests one at a time with immediate responses, batch processing allows you to submit multiple requests together for asynchronous processing. * You need to process large volumes of data. The Message Batches API is Anthropic's first implementation of this pattern. # Message Batches API. The Message Batches API is a powerful, cost-effective way to asynchronously process large volumes of Messages requests. ## How the Message Batches API works. When you send a request to the Message Batches API:. 1. The system creates a new Message Batch with the provided Messages requests. 3. You can poll for the status of the batch and retrieve results when processing has ended for all requests. * Rate limits apply to both Batches API HTTP requests and the number of requests within a batch waiting to be processed.

travisvn   /  **awesome-claude-skills**  Public. # travisvn/awesome-claude-skills. # Awesome Claude Skills. > A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows. **Claude Skills** teach Claude how to **perform tasks in a repeatable way**. They are specialized folders containing instructions, scripts, and resources that Claude dynamically discovers and loads when relevant to tasks. 2. **Full instructions** (<5k tokens): Load when Claude determines the Skill applies. 3. **Bundled resources**: Files and executable code load only as needed. This design allows multiple Skills to remain available without overwhelming Claude's context window. ### Claude API. See the Skills API documentation for detailed integration examples. * **skill-creator** - Interactive skill creation tool that guides you through building new skills with Q&A. 2. Ask Claude: "Use the skill-creator to help me build a skill for [your task]". * Install the skill in Claude Code or Claude Desktop. * Using Skills in Claude - How to enable and use skills.

title: 💻 Claude Code: Use skills in Claude | Claude Help Center
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Use skills in Claude. Skills are available for users on Free, Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans. Skills are also available in beta for Claude Code users and for all API users using the code execution tool. **For Enterprise plans:** Owners must first enable both **Code execution and file creation** and **Skills** in **Organization settings > Skills**. Owners can also upload skills to provision them organization-wide—these skills automatically appear for all users. Once skills are enabled at the organization level, individual members can toggle on example skills, access provisioned skills, and upload their own personal skills in **Customize > Skills**. **For Max, Pro, and Free plans:** You can enable example skills and upload your own in **Customize > Skills**. 1. For Team / Enterprise plans: Navigate to **Organization settings > Skills** and ensure that both **Code execution and file creation** and **Skills** are enabled. 2. For individual Free, Pro, and Max plans: Navigate to **Settings > Capabilities** and ensure that **Code execution and file creation** is enabled.
